name: Work Item Change Lifecycle
purpose: Coordinate implementation, validation, review, semantic alignment, and evidence rollup for one work item.

roles.label: Implementation
acceptance_criteria: Makes the scoped code/doc/config changes without expanding beyond the work item.

roles.label: Test Runner
acceptance_criteria: Runs focused verification or records a concrete validation gap.

roles.label: Code Review
acceptance_criteria: Prioritizes correctness, regressions, missing tests, and maintainability risks.

roles.label: Semantic Alignment
acceptance_criteria: Checks that the change still matches the broader plan and product intent.

roles.label: Evidence Rollup
acceptance_criteria: Combines outputs into one lifecycle evidence document with unresolved risks called out.
